allow: Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1 "Converter o projeto atual para funcionar com vuejs 3 mantendo as mesmas funcionalidades , mas usando as boas praticas indicadas no vue, confira na documentação mais recente do vue" -Json -ShortName "vue3-migration" "Migrate project to Vue 3")
Bash(npx shadcn-vue@latest add badge button checkbox collapsible context-menu dialog hover-card input scroll-area --overwrite)
Bash(COREPACK_ENABLE_STRICT=0 pnpm dlx shadcn-vue@latest add badge button checkbox collapsible context-menu dialog hover-card input scroll-area --yes)
Bash(COREPACK_ENABLE_STRICT=0 COREPACK_ENABLE_AUTO_PIN=0 npx -y shadcn-vue@latest add badge button checkbox collapsible context-menu dialog hover-card input scroll-area --yes --no-deps)
